page.title: Media Groups
page.emptyDescription: Create a new group to systematically manage your images.

imageView.title: {{name}} - Images
imageView.description: View direct images in this group
imageView.folderDescription: View direct images in this folder

modal.autoCollectDescription: Automatically add images that match the configured conditions to this group.
modal.autoCollectDisabledHelp: When auto-collection is enabled, newly uploaded images will be automatically added to this group based on the configured conditions.
modal.filterApplied: {{count}} filters applied. Execution order: Exclude → OR → AND
modal.addFiltersPrompt: Add filters to configure auto-collection conditions
modal.orConditionInfo: OR Condition: Multiple conditions will collect images that satisfy at least one condition.
modal.orConditionExample: Example: "Prompt contains 'anime'" + "Auto-tag has character" → Collects if either is satisfied
modal.emptyConditions: Add conditions to configure auto-collection rules.

fields.exactMatchHelp: When checked, only exact word matches are searched (e.g., 'asd' won't match 'aasd' or 'asdf')
fields.confidenceInfo: 💡 Higher scores indicate higher confidence in the tag
fields.hammingInfo: 💡 Hamming Distance measures bit differences between perceptual hashes. Lower values find more similar images.
fields.duplicateNote: ⚠️ This condition only searches images with perceptual_hash.

duplicateInfo.duplicate_exact: 📷 Finds exact duplicates (Hamming Distance = 0). Detects identical images even with different filenames or metadata.
duplicateInfo.duplicate_near: 🔍 Finds near duplicates (Hamming Distance ≤ 5). Detects images with resizing, compression, or minor edits.
duplicateInfo.duplicate_similar: 🎨 Finds similar images (Hamming Distance ≤ 15). Detects images with similar composition or content.

validation.conditionRequired: At least one condition is required to enable auto-collection.
validation.valueRequired: Please enter a value for condition {{index}}.
validation.ratingTypeRequired: Condition {{index}}: Please select a rating type.
validation.ratingScoreRequired: Condition {{index}}: Either min score or max score must be set.
validation.minScoreInvalid: Condition {{index}}: Min score must be 0 or greater.
validation.maxScoreInvalid: Condition {{index}}: Max score must be 0 or greater.
validation.scoreRangeInvalid: Condition {{index}}: Min score must be less than max score.
validation.confidenceScoreRange: Condition {{index}}: Min score must be between 0.0 and 1.0.
validation.confidenceMaxScoreRange: Condition {{index}}: Max score must be between 0.0 and 1.0.
validation.confidenceMinMaxInvalid: Condition {{index}}: Min score cannot be greater than max score.
validation.hammingThresholdRequired: Condition {{index}}: Hamming Distance threshold is required.
validation.hammingThresholdRange: Condition {{index}}: Hamming Distance must be between 0 and 64.

messages.removeError: An error occurred while removing images.
messages.assignError: An error occurred while assigning images.

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Group Deletion
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete the group '{{name}}'?

warning.imageAssociations: ⚠️ All associations between this group and images will be removed. The image files themselves will not be deleted.

orphan.label: Delete only this group (Recommended)
orphan.description: Subgroups will be moved to root level.

cascade.label: Delete this group and all subgroups
cascade.description: {{count}} subgroups will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

imageModal.title: {{name}} ({{count}} images)
imageModal.infoMixedSelection: Both manual and auto-collected images are selected. Only manual images can be removed, while group assignment applies to all selected images.
imageModal.warningAutoOnly: Auto-collected images cannot be removed directly from the group. Please change or disable the auto-collection conditions.
imageModal.confirmRemoveMessage: Remove {{count}} manually collected images from the group?
imageModal.confirmRemoveNote: The image files themselves will not be deleted.

assignModal.title: Assign to Group
assignModal.description: Assign {{count}} selected images to a group.
assignModal.loadingError: An error occurred while loading groups.

created: Group created. Please refresh your browser.
updated: Group updated. Please refresh your browser.

emptyState.createPrompt: Press the + button to create a new group

autoFolder.readOnlyMessage: This is a read-only group. Changes must be made to the original file location.

emptyState.refreshPrompt: Press the refresh button to create folder structure
